title: Dhikr al-Jahr (Audible Remembrance)
description: The audible practice of repeating Divine Names - the foundational Sufi devotional method that awakens the heart through sound.
instructions:
1. Find a quiet space.
2. Sit in a dignified posture.
3. Begin with praising Allah (SubhanAllah).
4. Repeat the Greatest Name (La ilaha illa Allah) softly.
5. Gradually increase volume.
6. Maintain presence of heart.
7. End with silence and gratitude.

title: Muraqaba (Vigil meditation)
description: The seated practice of self-watchfulness - presence with the Divine through stillness and inner observation.
instructions:
1. Sit comfortably with spine straight.
2. Close eyes gently.
3. Observe breath without control.
4. Notice thoughts arise and fall.
5. Return to stillness.
6. Open to inner presence.
7. Maintain for duration.
8. Exit gradually.

title: Contemplation of Death
description: The practice of remembering mortality - preparing the heart for the ultimate meeting.
instructions:
1. Sit peacefully.
2. Visualize your own death.
3. Consider the moment.
4. Reflect on what remains.
5. Understand attachment.
6. Feel release.
7. Return to living meaningfully.

title: Breath-work (Pranayama)
description: Conscious breathing to direct subtle energy and calm the nervous system.
instructions:
1. Sit comfortably.
2. Inhale deeply for 4 counts.
3. Hold for 4 counts.
4. Exhale for 4 counts.
5. Hold empty for 4 counts.
6. Repeat 10-20 times.
7. Notice宁静.

title: Visualization of Light
description: Guided visualization of Divine Light penetrating and illuminating the interior.
instructions:
1. Close eyes.
2. Imagine Divine Light above.
3. Feel it descending.
4. It enters the crown.
5. Flows through the body.
6. Illuminates the heart.
7. Fill with light.
8. Become the light.
